question.label: Team recognition
question.name: How did it feel to see the team's response to the payments refactor success?
question.description: Explores their feelings about recognition and impact on the team.

answer: Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.

assessment.note: Priya's response indicates a lack of significant impact from the team's recognition, suggesting a slight disengagement.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Current blockers check
new_queue.name: What blockers or dependencies are you currently facing that we haven't discussed?

new_queue.label: Mentoring opportunities
new_queue.name: What kind of mentoring opportunities are you envisioning for yourself?

history.answer_excerpt: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
